article_title: Google Launches Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a Real-Time Voice Model That Detects Emotion and Powers Agents Across 200 Countries

content_preview.title: Google Launches Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a Real-Time Voice Model That Detects Emotion and Powers Agents Across 200 Countries
content_preview.summary: Google's new Gemini 3.1 Flash Live model brings acoustic awareness, doubled context length, and tool-use capabilities to real-time voice AI, rolling out globally via Gemini Live and Search Live.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Google on March 26 released Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a real-time multimodal voice model designed for natural, low-latency audio conversations. The model is rolling out to Gemini Live on Android and iOS, to Search Live in more than 200 countries, and to developers via the Live API in Google AI Studio, according to [9to5Google](https://9to5google.com/2026/03/26/gemini-3-1-flash-live/).

Flash Live is the latest addition to Google's Gemini 3.1 family, which also includes the Pro and Flas...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-organized AI product launch article with clear feature breakdown (acoustic awareness, context length, tool use, multilingual). Good contextual comparison to Flash-Lite pricing via SiliconANGLE.
editor_notes.source_verification: 9to5Google (fetched): Confirms March 26 release, 'highest-quality audio and voice model yet' quote, 90+ languages, acoustic pitch/pace detection, background noise filtering, 2x conversation context, tool use improvements, instruction-following, Gemini Live Android/iOS, Search Live 200+ countries, Live API in AI Studio. Google Blog (fetched): Confirms launch date, availability across Google products, Search Live 200-country expansion, Live API. SiliconANGLE (fetched): Confirms Flash-Lite $0.25/M input tokens, $1.50/M output tokens, 45% faster than 2.5 Flash, mixture-of-experts architecture, 1M token input context.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All feature claims verified against 9to5Google. Pricing for Flash-Lite confirmed by SiliconANGLE. No hallucinated details detected.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. Analysis section appropriately discusses competitive implications without editorializing.
editor_notes.originality: No prior Gemini 3.1 Flash Live coverage. Archive has Gemini coverage but not this specific model launch.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Solid AI product launch coverage with verified sources. Ready for publication.
